description:
# Chat-Initiated Project Creation

Wire project lifecycle tools into the main Ava chat so users can initiate, refine, and launch projects through natural conversation. Full flow: user describes idea → Ava generates PRD → user approves → features created → PM agent spawned.

## Phases
1. Project Lifecycle Tools in Ava Chat
title: [Epic] Chat-Initiated Project Creation
